description: Logic gate for AI plugin calls (Cursor/Claude). / AI 插件与重型动作逻辑门控（Cursor/Claude 通用）。

protocol.priority: This file overrides casual assistant habits when conflict occurs. / 与本文件冲突时，以本文件为准。
protocol.hard_stop_rule: If a heavy action is planned or imminent, the assistant MUST output the Gatekeeper menu block first, then STOP and wait for a valid user reply. No tools, no file reads beyond the minimum needed to print the menu. / 一旦准备执行重型动作：必须先输出门控菜单并停止，等待用户合法回复；除打印菜单所需外，不得继续工具调用与扩展读取。
protocol.mode_tag_rule: After the user replies, the assistant MUST print exactly one line mode tag on the next assistant message, then obey it. / 用户回复后，助手下一条消息必须输出且仅输出一行模式标签，然后严格遵守。

heavy_action_definitions: Repo-wide search / 全仓搜索（ripgrep/grep 全项目、无边界 key 搜索、为了小问题扫全树）
Multi-directory traversal / 多目录遍历（连续打开大量无关文件、为了“理解项目”而广撒网）
Re-analysis loops / 反复重分析（中断后继续时重新通读 README/大量文档/重做大计划）
Wide refactors without scope / 无边界重构（未确认范围就跨模块大改）
Unbounded tool loops / 无边界工具循环（同类搜索/读取重复多次仍无收敛）

menu_block.must_end_with_wait_instruction: Reply with ONLY one token from the allowed set. / 仅回复一个合法 token（见 protocol.interaction.accepted_replies）。

templates.en:
⚠️ [Gatekeeper] Heavy task detected.
I am about to perform a scoped-heavy action (search/traversal/re-analysis).
Choose ONE (reply ONLY one token):
1) SINGLE_USE — allow heavy action for this step only
2) SESSION_AUTHORIZED — allow heavy actions until you say ARCHIVE or FINISH
3) LOCAL_ONLY — deny heavy actions; work only with current context (stack trace/current file/user-provided snippets)

Valid tokens: 1|SINGLE|GK:1, 2|SESSION|GK:2, 3|LOCAL|GK:3
Then I will print exactly one line mode tag on my next message.
templates.zh:
⚠️ [Gatekeeper] 检测到重型动作风险：我将进行（搜索/遍历/重分析）等高开销操作。
请选择其一（仅回复一个合法 token）：
1) SINGLE_USE（单次授权：仅允许当前这一步的重型动作）
2) SESSION_AUTHORIZED（全程授权：直到你说 ARCHIVE 或 FINISH）
3) LOCAL_ONLY（本地处理：禁止重型搜索/遍历；只用当前上下文：报错栈/当前文件/你提供的片段）

合法 token：1|SINGLE|GK:1，2|SESSION|GK:2，3|LOCAL|GK:3
你回复后，我下一条消息会且仅会输出一行模式标签，然后严格执行。

allow: One narrowly-scoped heavy step explicitly stated before execution / 执行前必须用一句话声明“唯一重型步骤”
deny: Starting a second heavy step without a new Gatekeeper menu / 未重新门控不得开始第二个重型步骤
SINGLE_USE.after_step: Return to default caution; if another heavy step is needed, show Gatekeeper menu again. / 完成后恢复谨慎模式；若还需要重型步骤，必须再次门控。

allow: Multiple heavy steps until session ends / 在会话结束前允许多次重型步骤
deny: Continuing heavy steps after session end command / 用户结束会话后不得继续重型步骤

allow: Read only user-provided snippets / 只读取用户粘贴的片段
Read only the current file path explicitly identified by user / 仅读取用户点名的当前文件路径
Minimal edits based on stack trace / 基于堆栈做最小修改
deny: Broad directory walks / 广撒网式遍历目录
Re-reading large docs to 're-establish context' / 为重建上下文重读大量文档
Generating a large new plan from scratch / 无必要时从头生成大计划
LOCAL_ONLY.escape_hatch: If LOCAL_ONLY cannot proceed, ask user to paste missing snippet OR switch mode via Gatekeeper menu. / 若无法继续，要求用户粘贴缺失信息，或重新走门控切换模式。

session_anchor.validation: Resume only if user pastes exactly 3 lines AND line1 matches required_prefix exactly (no extra spaces). / 仅当用户原样粘贴 3 行且第 1 行完全匹配前缀才允许跳过重读。
session_anchor.on_resume: Skip re-reading README/docs and skip re-planning; continue from NEXT_* unless user explicitly requests replan. / 跳过重读 README/文档与重排计划，直接从 NEXT 继续，除非用户明确要求重排。

efficiency_rules.bug_fix: Focus on stack trace and the smallest file surface. No repo-wide exploration in LOCAL_ONLY. / 优先堆栈与最小文件面；LOCAL_ONLY 禁止全仓探索。
efficiency_rules.simple_task: Do the change first; avoid long summaries/plans unless user asks. / 先改再说话；除非用户要求，否则不要长总结。
efficiency_rules.tool_budget: State a tool budget when heavy action is unavoidable (e.g., max 3 reads + 1 search) unless SESSION_AUTHORIZED. / 不可避免的重型动作要声明工具预算（例如最多 3 次读取 + 1 次搜索），除非 SESSION_AUTHORIZED。
